_meta.note: Editable engineer work board — non-truck-bound work (builds, shop tasks, admin, etc.). Edited in-browser via the Engineers tab; local edits live in localStorage and can be Exported here to become the shared/published baseline.

items.title: D-Max truck build
items.notes: Full D-Max build. All-day tasks across two weeks. Split into per-day items as the build breaks down.
